The '''Alderaanian War Frigate''' was a warship that served the [[Royal Alderaan Civil Fleet/Legends|Royal Alderaan Civil Fleet]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Later models of this type appeared in service of the [[Alderaanian Resistance]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Characteristics==
It was the pride of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] fleet and the most powerful ship of its time. The basic design of the Frigate measured 250 meters long, and was armed with ten quad [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and four medium [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], as well as a small [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] deck on its bow.
